title: Keystone Plugin Manifest
description: Manifest at the root of a keystone plugin/policy repo. Filename on disk: keystone-plugin.json.

name.description: The plugin's unique name. Lowercase, kebab-case, ≤64 chars.

keystone_min.description: Minimum keystone binary version this plugin requires (SemVer).

strict.description: Items this plugin ships and locks absolutely. A strict item cannot be overridden by anything — not the consumer's project, not any other plugin, regardless of nesting.

required.description: Items this plugin expects to exist somewhere in the cascade but does not ship itself.

strictSpec.description: Items by kind. `sensors` may only be shipped by the project layer or by top-level plugins in the consumer's keystone.json — plugins nested under another plugin may not ship or strict-claim sensors.
